stemHtml: According to AIR OPS, take-off shall not be commenced…

options.a: Even if the ice contamination does not lead to an exceedance of mass and balance limits.
options.b: Unless the external surfaces are free from any ice contamination greater than 5 mm.
options.c: Unless the external surfaces are clear of any contamination, except as permitted by Aircraft Flight Manual.
options.d: Unless the external surfaces are still covered with anti-icing fluid and the aircraft is not to be operated in forecast icing conditions greater than moderate icing.
